examples: Mark Cuban's best player is still a tall gawky German guy.
She thought she was gawky , that her hair was too frizzy, her skin too pale.
One day he saw Lincoln - a tall, shambling man, long, bony, gawky, but tremendously impressive.
Some are gawky, silly, and look somehow incomplete without clowns tumbling out of them.
From afar the creatures appear gawky and unsettling, with their long, scrawny legs, puffball bodies and impossible necks.
